architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: The AgriTech Platform is built as a multi-tenant SaaS application using a monorepo structure with pnpm workspaces.

database/schema.title: Database Schema
database/schema.description: This document describes the database schema used by the AgriTech Platform, including tables for multi-tenancy, module configuration, and core farming entities.

features/satellite-analysis.title: Satellite Analysis Service
features/satellite-analysis.description: The AgriTech Platform's satellite service provides multi-provider access to Sentinel-2 data through a unified interface, supporting both Google Earth Engine (GEE) and Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (CDSE/openEO).

features/subscriptions.title: Subscriptions & Module System
features/subscriptions.description: The AgriTech Platform uses a subscription-based module system that enables features based on the organization's plan tier. This document covers the implementation of subscriptions, module configuration, and access control.

getting-started/installation.title: Installation
getting-started/installation.description: This guide will help you set up the AgriTech Platform development environment on your local machine.

getting-started/quick-start.title: Quick Start
getting-started/quick-start.description: Get the AgriTech Platform running locally in about 10 minutes.

guides/adding-feature.title: Adding a Feature
guides/adding-feature.description: This guide walks through adding a new feature to the AgriTech Platform.

intro.title: AgriTech Platform Documentation
intro.description: Welcome to the AgriTech Platform - a comprehensive agricultural technology solution built for modern farming operations.
